data.text: This card is rendered by a custom component plugin — the library doesn't know about "demo_fun_fact" out of the box.

data.title: Did you know?
data.fact: Kotlin was named after Kotlin Island near St. Petersburg, Russia. The JetBrains team chose the name because it was short, memorable, and — like Java — named after an island.

data.text: These buttons trigger action plugins. The "open_url" plugin launches a browser. The "navigate" plugin shows a Toast (since the demo has no deep-link routes).

data.title: Compose Fun Fact
data.fact: Jetpack Compose was first announced at Google I/O 2019 and reached stable 1.0 in July 2021. It replaced the 10-year-old View system as the recommended way to build Android UI.
